scripts.supabase:schema:sync: sh -c 'set -a; . ./.env 2>/dev/null; set +a; mkdir -p supabase/generated && tmp_file=$(mktemp supabase/generated/types.ts.tmp.XXXXXX) && trap "rm -f \"$tmp_file\"" EXIT && pnpm exec supabase gen types typescript --project-id "$SUPABASE_PROJECT_ID" --schema public,authz > "$tmp_file" && mv "$tmp_file" supabase/generated/types.ts && trap - EXIT && node ./scripts/append-supabase-jsdoc-types.mjs'
scripts.test:e2e: cd apps/orchestrator && set -a; . ./.env 2>/dev/null; set +a; SYMPHONY_RUN_LIVE_E2E=1 mix test test/symphony_elixir/live_e2e_test.exs
scripts.start:orchestrator:watch: cd apps/orchestrator && set -a; . ./.env 2>/dev/null; set +a; mix escript.build && while :; do ../../scripts/start-orchestrator.sh --no-dashboard; status=$?; if [ "$status" -eq 0 ]; then echo "[orchestrator] exited normally (code 0), stopping."; break; else delay="${ORCH_RESTART_DELAY_SECONDS:-2}"; echo "[orchestrator] exited with code $status; restarting in ${delay}s"; sleep "$delay"; fi; done
